caption: A woman with blonde hair wearing a black top is visible in a small inset window on the left side of the screen. The main focus of the video is a large silver bowl filled with popcorn, some of which is colored green. The background behind the bowl is a light-colored wall and a piece of furniture. In the top-left corner of each scene, the logo and text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" are displayed against a blue sky background with white clouds. Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains static; the woman in the inset window maintains a neutral expression and posture, and the popcorn in the bowl does not move. There are no interactions or changes in action between the frames, suggesting a still or very slow-moving shot.
